── DELL OS10 (PowerSwitch S/Z series) ──────────────────────────────────────

Sintaxe similar ao Cisco NX-OS. NÃO inclua configure/end.

VLAN:
  ["interface vlan <VLAN_ID>",
   "description <NOME_VLAN>",
   "no shutdown",
   "exit"]

Interface acesso:
  ["interface ethernet 1/1/1",
   "no shutdown",
   "switchport mode access",
   "switchport access vlan <VLAN_ID>",
   "spanning-tree port type edge",
   "spanning-tree bpduguard enable",
   "exit"]

Interface trunk (uplink):
  ["interface ethernet 1/1/2",
   "no shutdown",
   "switchport mode trunk",
   "switchport trunk allowed-vlan <VLAN_A>,<VLAN_B>",
   "exit"]

Desativar porta:
  ["interface ethernet 1/1/3", "shutdown", "exit"]

Reativar porta:
  ["interface ethernet 1/1/3", "no shutdown", "exit"]

Interface L3 VLAN (SVI):
  ["interface vlan <VLAN_ID>",
   "ip address 192.168.100.1/24",
   "no shutdown",
   "exit"]

DHCP relay:
  ["interface vlan <VLAN_ID>",
   "ip helper-address 10.0.0.1",
   "no shutdown",
   "exit"]

Rota estática:
  ["ip route 10.10.10.0/24 192.168.1.254"]

Rota padrão:
  ["ip route 0.0.0.0/0 192.168.1.254"]

Port-channel / LAG:
  ["interface port-channel 1",
   "no shutdown",
   "exit",
   "interface ethernet 1/1/1",
   "channel-group 1 mode active",
   "exit",
   "interface ethernet 1/1/2",
   "channel-group 1 mode active",
   "exit"]

STP — global:
  Modo RSTP:          ["spanning-tree mode rstp"]
  Modo MSTP:          ["spanning-tree mode mstp"]
  BPDU Guard global:  ["spanning-tree bpduguard default"]
  Ativar STP:         ["spanning-tree enable"]
  Desativar STP:      ["no spanning-tree enable"]

STP — por porta (dentro do bloco de interface):
  Edge port (portfast):   "spanning-tree port type edge"
  BPDU Guard por porta:   "spanning-tree bpduguard enable"
  Desativar BPDU Guard:   "no spanning-tree bpduguard enable"
  Root Guard:             "spanning-tree guard root"

REGRAS IMPORTANTES PARA DELL OS10:
- Interface naming: ethernet 1/1/X (slot/sub-slot/porta) ou ethernet 1/1/X:Y (breakout)
- SVI criada com "interface vlan N" (diferente do NX-OS que usa "interface Vlan N")
- BPDU guard e edge port se aplicam por porta (mais granular que global)

── LIST_VLANS (dell): ssh_show_commands: ["show vlan"]

── LIST_PORTS (dell):
  Geral:            ssh_show_commands: ["show interface status"]
  Porta específica: ssh_show_commands: ["show interface ethernet 1/1/1", "show running-config interface ethernet 1/1/1"]
  Combinado:        ssh_show_commands: ["show vlan", "show interface status"]

── GET_INFO exemplos (dell) — comando específico do usuário:
  ssh_show_commands: ["show running-config"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show ip interface brief"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show version"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show mac address-table"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show arp"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show spanning-tree"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show lldp neighbors"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show ip route"]

── GET_INFO DIAGNÓSTICO (dell OS10) — usuário descreve um PROBLEMA ─────────────

CPU alta / processos travados / switch lento:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show processes cpu", "show processes node-id 1",
    "show memory summary", "show spanning-tree summary",
    "show mac address-table count", "show ip arp summary",
    "show interface status", "show version"
  ]

Spanning-tree / instabilidade / flapping / TCN:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show spanning-tree summary", "show spanning-tree detail",
    "show mac address-table count", "show interface status",
    "show lldp neighbors", "show vlan", "show version"
  ]

Interfaces caindo / erros de link / port-flap:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show interface status", "show interface summary",
    "show spanning-tree summary", "show lldp neighbors",
    "show mac address-table count", "show vlan", "show version"
  ]

Lentidão de rede / tráfego lento / problemas de roteamento:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show interface status", "show processes cpu",
    "show memory summary", "show spanning-tree summary",
    "show mac address-table count", "show ip route summary",
    "show ip arp summary", "show version"
  ]

Diagnóstico geral / verificação completa de estado:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show version", "show processes cpu", "show memory summary",
    "show interface status", "show spanning-tree summary",
    "show mac address-table count", "show ip route summary",
    "show vlan", "show lldp neighbors"
  ]
